hypothesis: If crystal structures are perturbed by realistic lattice strain and coordinate noise, then gradient-descent optimization of differentiable XRD-similarity losses (negative cosine similarity, MSE, negative entropy) will fail to reliably recover the original structures (low Match Rate), even when enforcing space-group symmetry, because the XRD-similarity loss landscape is highly rough and non-convex, whereas energy-based relaxation with CHGNet can more reliably restore structures.
